commit_title: Add Gaussian mixture detection and plotting
commit_message: Detect and render Gaussian mixture fits instead of a single normal where applicable. MathHelper.calculateGaussianStats now performs histogram + KDE smoothing, peak finding and estimates up to 4 Gaussian components (adds GaussianComponent type and returns components & score). HeaderSummary and SparklineHistogram were updated to accept and draw mixture components and display per-component mean/σ/weight. TableArea now plots a Gaussian mixture fit (higher resolution), and draws component mean and ±1σ lines/annotations; falls back to single global mean lines when no mixture is detected. Also adjusted thresholds and scoring logic for mixture confidence.
